items.briefing:
A new malware campaign is targeting WordPress websites by hiding malicious code inside fake Steam gaming profiles — if your organisation runs a WordPress site, it's worth checking with your web team that plugins and themes are up to date and that the site is being monitored for unusual changes. Separately, a study shows Australians are increasingly using AI tools despite growing concerns about trust and safety, highlighting the need for clear workplace policies on AI use.

Commvault is also reminding Australian organisations to build resilience against AI-driven cyber threats by having solid backup and recovery plans in place. **Practical tip:** Check that your organisation's website software and plugins are updated regularly — outdated platforms are a common entry point for attackers.

featured.title: Orca Opti launches free AI governance tool for Australia
featured.quote: Australian firm launches free AI governance tool amid stricter local regulations on AI use.
